title: Phymatodes simplex

The resin of Phymatodes simplex has been traditionally used in herbal medicine to treat a variety of health issues, including respiratory problems, fever, and inflammation, due to its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. The bioactive constituents of this plant include terpenoids, diterpenes, and flavonoids, which contribute to its therapeutic effects. In traditional Chinese medicine, Phymatodes simplex is often used to prepare teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as being incorporated into various herbal formulations and extracts to support respiratory health and immune function.
